contacts.note: Personal directory kept for Karen and for my own reference. Phone is my first choice for most of these. Karen set the larger print on the tablet so I can read it.

person.name: Karen Lawton-Mitchell
person.notes: Ten minutes away. My right hand for errands, groceries, and appointments. Reviews the accounts twice a year.

person.name: David Mitchell
person.notes: Drives me to church when the car is acting up. Helped with the backyard fence.

person.name: Emily Mitchell
person.notes: Quizzes well on pharmacology. The graduation quilt is for her.

person.name: Tyler Mitchell
person.notes: Living with Karen and David for now.

person.name: Brian Lawton
person.notes: Visits the second weekend of each month. Helped set up the Vanguard fund.

person.name: Hailey Lawton
person.notes: Competitive dancer. Visits for holidays and summer.

person.name: Connor Lawton
person.notes: Loves soccer and video games. Calls me Grammy and tells me everything.

person.name: Margaret Thornton
person.preferredChannel: Video call, Sundays after church around 12:30 PM
person.notes: Retired schoolteacher. My closest confidant. I drive to Brunswick every two to three weeks.

person.name: Dorothy Henderson
person.notes: Next door. We walk every morning at 7:00 AM and watch the PBS programs together. Friends more than forty years.

person.name: Reverend Thomas Caldwell
person.notes: Spiritual advisor. I serve on the altar guild.

person.name: Dr. Stephen Patterson
person.notes: Monitors the cataracts. Right eye more advanced.
